themes.title: Far-right parties surge in European polls
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are seeing unprecedented support in recent polls, with Germany's AfD reaching a historic high of 28% and similar trends observed in other countries. This surge reflects growing public dissatisfaction with mainstream politics and a shift towards nationalist and anti-immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD hits record 28% in polls, leading CDU/CSU and SPD.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN struggles with campaign financing but leads French polls at 35%.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD's influence grows in Swedish politics, with Liberals easing stance on cooperation.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP criticizes fuel policies and gains traction in Norwegian political debates.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox pushes 'national priority' policies in regional governments, gaining influence.

themes.title: Orbán’s resignation reshapes Hungarian politics
themes.blurb: Viktor Orbán's decision to step down from Hungary's parliament following his party's election defeat marks a significant shift in Hungarian politics. The rise of Péter Magyar's Tisza Party signals a potential realignment of the country's political landscape, with implications for EU relations and domestic policy.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Orbán resigns parliamentary seat, focuses on party reorganization after election loss.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Tisza Party gains momentum, appoints new ministers and negotiates EU funds.

countries.name: 🇪🇺 EU Relations
countries.note: Hungary's new government seeks to renegotiate EU funding and policy alignment.

themes.title: PP-Vox coalitions spark constitutional debates
themes.blurb: The formation of coalition governments between Spain's Partido Popular (PP) and Vox in regions like Extremadura and Aragón has ignited debates over constitutional legality and human rights. These coalitions prioritize 'national citizens' in public aid, raising concerns about discrimination and exclusion.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox pushes 'national priority' policies in regional coalitions with PP.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Partido Popular
countries.note: PP forms coalitions with Vox, sparking legal and ethical debates.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 PSOE
countries.note: PSOE condemns PP-Vox pacts as unconstitutional and discriminatory.

themes.title: Trump’s foreign policy dominates global headlines
themes.blurb: President Trump's foreign policy decisions, particularly regarding Iran and NATO, continue to dominate global headlines. His administration's actions, such as canceling Iran talks and threatening NATO allies, have sparked international reactions and debates over U.S. leadership.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump cancels Iran talks, escalates tensions with NATO allies.

countries.note: Italy's Meloni navigates U.S.-EU tensions over NATO and Iran policies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 UK Relations
countries.note: UK seeks to repair relations with U.S. amid Trump's foreign policy shifts.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric in countries like Italy and Spain is increasingly linked to incidents of political violence. Protests, vandalism, and confrontations during national holidays and political rallies highlight the growing polarization and tensions within these societies.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni condemns political violence during Liberation Day celebrations.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox rallies spark confrontations with protesters, leading to accusations of incitement.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK faces backlash over inflammatory rhetoric and candidate controversies.
